title: Integrated Applied Modeling and Communication · Cumulative Modeling Board
summary: A cumulative set of unfamiliar household, workplace, civic, measurement, data, and computational decisions with no copied exercise wording. Planned artifact: Produce a cumulative evidence packet across unfamiliar cases, performance tasks, explanations, and root-cause repairs. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret a number together with its unit, reference population, time window, and practical meaning.
State assumptions and distinguish measured, given, estimated, and derived values.
Evaluate grouped expressions with a documented order of operations and intermediate checks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.

steps.title: Solve the performance case
steps.instruction: A measured quantity starts at 19 units, changes by −6 units, then by +2 units. Calculate the final quantity. Use the result to decide Stakeholder Defense for an independently validated applied-math decision packet.
steps.why: The Stakeholder Defense result for an independently validated applied-math decision packet is incomplete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Preserve the signs and compute 19 − 6 + 2; compare with the starting scale. hints: Preserve the signs and compute 19 − 6 + 2; compare with the starting scale.

The accepted result is within 0.001 of the exact value and includes units.
